examples: In such event the offending member or guest shall be trespasser.
Death is a cruel, brutal, and fearsome trespasser into this world.
In such event the offending member or guest shall then trespasser.
Musician Chris Wood took home the album of the year prize for Trespasser and was named folk singer of the year.
Police must prove that a person knowingly entered a building as a trespasser and "is living or intends to live" in it.
